message:
fix: use absolute positioning for xterm in tile cells (#62)

The xterm canvas from the previous single-view size was pushing the
first grid cell wider before fitAddon.fit() could run. By using
position: absolute for the xterm container inside each tile cell,
the terminal content is taken out of normal flow and cannot influence
grid column sizing. The grid cells now size purely based on
minmax(0, 1fr) without content pressure.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
